Factual answer here, based on personal experience:
You can preserve the freshness of vegetables, even after freezing, by freezing in individual servings, and then packaging them in airtight plastic bags that are packed into vacuum storage bags.  When you're ready to use the vegetables, you can just reheat them, without having to thaw them first.

response_1.content: How do I pack vegetables to keep them fresh in the freezer?

Well, freezing vegetables isn’t a great way to preserve them, so keep in mind that they’re going to lose some quality after freezing.  Still, freezing is often the best way to store vegetables in large quantities, especially if you have a lot of them in a few different varieties.  When freezing vegetables, you want to get them frozen as soon as possible, and get them to -18 C / -0.5 F, which may take a few hours.  Package the vegetables individually to keep moisture from getting in all the bags, then arrange them on a tray inside the freezer before storing.  Also, to make sure frozen vegetables stay fresh for a long time, try to vacuum seal them in small bags after they’ve frozen solid.  This will help protect them from future freezer burn and rancidity.  So, in short, evenly freezing vegetables on a tray, then individually vacuum sealing them afterwards is probably your best bet.  Good luck!

response_0.content: A friend is recovering from substance abuse, what can I do to show him my support?

This is a really challenging experience for your friend, and your support and encouragement will be extremely valuable and appreciated. Spend time with him and listen to him openly without judgement or negative commentary. Let him know that you are there for him whenever he needs help or advice, and that you are available to accompany him to any counseling or rehabilitation appointments that he may need to attend. Offer to accompany him on social outings, and help him plan new activities and hobbies that he might find enjoyable and stimulating.  Encourage him to be actively involved in his recovery and gradually reintegrate into his social and work life.  Above all, remain supportive and compassionate, and avoid any judgmental or negative commentary about his condition or actions.

response_1.content: A friend is recovering from substance abuse, what can I do to show him my support?

It’s great that your friend is working to overcome a substance abuse problem, it’s certainly a challenge that many people face. Supporting your friend during a recovery journey is key, and there are a few things you can do. For starters, encourage your friend to continue attending counseling appointments, and remind them that this support is always available, even after further success and progress. As you can imagine, overcoming substance abuse takes time, so you can also help your friend by encouraging them to stay in recovery for the long haul. Offer your friend positive feedback related to their efforts and progress, as this can help motivate them to stay on the right recovery path. And make sure they know that the life they lead after recovery can still be rewarding. By offering positive and compassionate support, you can be a huge ally in your friend’s recovery.

What kinds of berries do crows like?

Crows are very generalist foragers and eat a wide variety of plant and animal food sources.  However, they are particularly fond of ripe fruit and seeds, and their foraging behavior is specifically adapted to locating a variety of berries, nuts, and seeds.  Berries that crows are particularly attracted to include blackberries, raspberries, mulberries, Salem grapes, elderberries, and hawthorn berries.  Nuts and seeds which crows commonly eat include black walnuts, various species of oak acorns, serviceberries, various species of maple seeds, and wild grape seeds. Crows are also general scavengers and will commonly eat carrion, garbage, and insect pest droppings (e.g. honeybee and ant larvae).  In addition, crows commonly eat animal food sources including earthworms, small snails, and insects.

response_1.content: How do I teach a child to count money?

Counting can be tricky, and it involves lots of concepts all at once.  There’s the concept of the quantity of a set of things, the number system, multiplication and fractions, and how to use each of these.  You can really show a child how to count by using concrete physical items, like coins and bills.  But you can also model it with abstract symbols and ideas like “three” or “half of something.”

response_0.content: Can you tell me a brief history about photography and how it came about?

Sure, photography is a really old art. People have been taking pictures ever since they figured out how to make images, which has been for tens of thousands of years. But people have only been able to capture these images reliably in a relatively recent period of human history. People invented chemical processes in the 1780s and 19th century to make images that are permanent on paper or glass, and also to make images that we could enlarge or reduce easily, rather than being stuck with the size of the original object that the image was made from. This was a huge development, because it meant that many things we’d been familiar with could be shared with others and be seen by more people than ever before.
When was the first color photographs and cameras created?
Color photography and cameras existed as early as 1888, but color photography was much harder to do than black-and-white, and so it took a little longer to become common.
Why does it take longer than black and white photos?

It’s hard to answer this question concretely, because it’s been a long time since I learned chemistry and I’m not that familiar with the art, but I think there are two main reasons for this: 1) To make a color photo, the photographer actually has to create three pictures with different dyes that are layered on top of each other in the image, and then capture all three layers at the same time, so there are a lot more moving parts and decisions to make. 2) Before there was digital photography, digital cameras could only capture in black and white because they were made of silicon, and silicon can only capture in shades of gray. When digital cameras first came out, they were still hard to use and only worked in black and white, so color was a relatively new thing at that point.
Who invented color cameras and photos?

The American newspaperman E.J. Edwards is credited with developing the first mass-produced camera that could capture color images. That’s in 1888. He wanted to help newspapers by creating a camera that could capture more exciting photos to help sell more newspapers. The reason this is useful is that in that era, it was very common for people to read the newspaper or magazine to get their news, so most people couldn’t capture their own photographs, they could only capture images through printing presses or photographs. But his creation ended up being pretty impractical, because it required the use of up to three different film rolls, three lenses, and a really complicated mechanism for capturing the color images. This sort of invention makes it clear why it took so long for cameras to be able to capture in color, and that there are still many challenges with color photography.

response_0.content: How do corals get food?

Most corals are photosynthetic, which means that they convert sunlight into sugars that they then use for food.  Many corals also have tentacles, so they’ll sometimes go out to hunt for plankton.  But most of the time, the coral can get all the food it needs by photosynthesizing, or by eating what’s already attached to its body.
What is their relationship to zooxanthellae

The zooxanthellae live inside the coral, and help it by providing sugars that are derived from the food the coral eats.  The zooxanthellae themselves get everything they need from the coral, including sunlight and sugar, and also help the coral stay healthy by removing harmful waste products.
Do they need to photosynthesize food?
Yes, every coral species that lives on land needs to photosynthesize.  Some also hunt for prey, like zooxanthellae or plankton.
Does this mean that corals are plants?

Corals are made up of many different kinds of cells, but they can be generally classed as “animals”.  The animal cells are very different from the plant cells.  The coral makes its own food, with the help of the zooxanthellae, which are animals.  But the coral cells live together in close contact with the plant cells.  Many corals and most plants are made up of a group of both animal and plant cells.  There are also lots of different types of corals that belong to different families.

response_0.content: Can you still use Microsoft Office without paying a monthly subscription?

This depends on whether or not you already have a Microsoft Office 365 subscription.  To see if you already have a subscription, open Microsoft Office on your computer and go to File > Account Settings.  If you have a subscription, you should see a little lock icon to the right of the Account Settings box.
Is there a free version?

Yes, there’s a free version of Office that can be installed without a subscription.  However, you should check the EULA for that version and see if it says anything about “non-subscription” installations.
What is the EULA?

A EULA (End-User License Agreement) is a contract between the company that creates a software program and the people who buy or install it.  EULAs are basically legal documents, and it’s illegal to change them in a way that could mean a user is now in breach of that contract.  For more information, check the “Agreement” box on the box you get when you purchase the software or on the “Legal Notices” section of the “Help” menu in Office.

response_1.content: What can I do to my son addicted to porn?

Addiction to pornography is a complicated problem, but ultimately, treating it is an individual matter that must be figured out together by you and your son. It’s much easier for porn addiction to be overcome when there is support, encouragement, and acceptance from family members. It’s best to first start talking to your son about the issue, in a calm and non-judgemental way. You can help with this by encouraging your son to be open with you about any pornography-related experiences or feelings that may be bothering him. Explain to your son that the family will be there to help him with this, and keep your reaction non-judgmental. This is an important part of the therapy and support process, to keep the lines of communication open, so that there are no secrets in the house and your child feels comfortable talking to you about these matters. Keep in mind that pornography is not the same thing as sex, and that being attracted to pornography does not mean that a child has an unhealthy interest in sex or wants to experience it. Regardless, it’s important to address these feelings and educate your child regarding healthy sexual behavior.

Above all, you should try not to be hypocritical. Pornography use is widespread in society, and the negative effects related to it are a matter of growing concern. Studies have shown that there is no clear connection between pornography use and sexual violence, so you shouldn’t assume that viewing pornography is unhealthy without taking a balanced view of the facts. Where children and adolescents are concerned, the evidence indicates that pornography addiction may cause neurodevelopmental, cognitive, and emotional problems , but the majority of these problems have been found in young people who were sexually abused or witnessed domestic violence. However, not all children who are addicted to pornography will develop such negative symptoms.  The focus here should be on getting your child the help and therapy he needs. A family therapist or a psychologist can be very helpful in helping you and your child cope with and improve any pornography-related issues in your home.

When you’re citing a resource, you’ll probably need to include the title of the article, which is usually set apart from the body of the text in a heading called the “title” or “heading”.  
The author’s name should also be included in your citation, even if it’s the same as the title of the article.  
If the website has no author, you can cite it as “the website”, “the site”, “the blog”, “the writer” or some other appropriate description.  
Citations of websites may also require a complete URL, with http:// or the equivalent if it’s not included.  This is especially important if you’re citing a website with a different structure than a normal webpage, such as blogs with dynamic links, mobile apps, or website sections with a different web address.  In this case you’ll need to include the web address.  
A good way to identify a different address is a “URI” or “URL”, which stands for “Universal Resource Identifier” and is sometimes referred to as “URL”.  A URI is like a unique web address.  For example, the URI for this website is: “https://www.snopes.com/

response_0.content: Do dogs really need coats in the winter?

Yes, it’s because they don’t have the same kind of body hair as humans, and their fur is shorter, so they can’t get enough heat from it.  For example, when dogs were first domesticated by humans, in the Netherlands, they were simply bred for fluffiness, which helped keep them warm.  But eventually they were crossed with large wolves, and so they lost some of their fluffiness and fur.  Then they were crossed with other different types of dogs and eventually there were no “pure” dog breeds that still had fluffiness.  This meant they needed some way to keep warm, so they started wearing clothes.
So I should put one on my dog when it is freezing out?

If they have a dog with an undercoat that is vulnerable to cold, they need to make sure they don’t let it get too cold.

response_0.content: Why did George Washington step down as president and choose to voluntarily give up power?

The main reason he stepped down was to avoid being a power-hungded monarch.  He didn’t want to be the president for life, and he also wanted to set a good example for the country.  He was also pretty old by that point, and wanted to retire.
Why did he interpret a continued presidency as something power-hungry or monarchical?

One of the main goals of the American revolution was to create a country in which the people have a voice and can make changes to the government when they disagree with what’s going on, and can elect new leaders.  Since a president can have a lot of power, for example, being able to veto the legislature, there was a lot of worry that a president would become a monarch.  So having a president that can serve for a fixed number of years and then step down is seen as a mechanism for preventing the president from becoming like a king.

He also refused to remain in office after two terms, because he didn’t want to set a precedent for presidents serving for life.  He was a key founder in establishing a precedent for a short, peaceful transition between presidencies.

response_0.content: How do you remove tea stains from your teeth?

To remove tea or coffee stains from your teeth, try using a mixture of toothpaste and salt.  Brush your teeth gently but thoroughly, and then rinse with warm water and mouthwash.  Begin by thoroughly brushing the teeth to remove any loose particles.  Get a small amount of regular toothpaste, and add about 1/2 teaspoon of salt. Apply this mixture to your toothbrush and use it to brush your teeth, working the toothpaste into the teeth and gums. Finish by rinsing well with warm water, and then rinsing again with some mouthwash.  

The salt helps to open microscopic pores in the tooth enamel, allowing the toothpaste to penetrate and assist in removing tea or coffee stains more effectively.  Regular daily brushing with toothpaste and salt is a very effective way to prevent and remove tea and coffee stains.  You can also clear tea and coffee stains professionally with a dentist by using special stain removing toothpaste and polishing techniques.

response_0.content: My waterproof jacket shell keeps wetting out. Is this normal?

I’m not really sure what you mean by “waterproof”, but you can try something called “breathability”. This will let water vapor move through your clothing, and avoid that uncomfortable trapped-sweat feeling you mention. I don’t have any precise advice for you about your particular jacket, but there are many things you could try that will get you someplace similar. Some simple things you could try would be: moving your jacket from a darker color fabric to one that’s a more natural-looking gray or off-white, or reducing the amount of thick synthetic insulation in your jacket, or layering a thin synthetic jacket over a thicker jacket. I think you might find this fabric-color chart helpful in general. You could also ask your jacket’s manufacturer or an expert, although I don’t want you to be discouraged if it’s not a simple solution.

Wetting out is actually due in part to that layered construction. The breathability of waterproof gear contributes to wetting out because when the outer layer gets wet, it increases humidity on the layer closest to your body, and then you're damp.
Interesting, thanks for explaining! I thought you meant something different. I wonder how I could better have said that...?
Can I prevent a jacket from wetting out, or is that something that happens to all waterproof jackets after a long enough time in a wet environment?

Most waterproof jackets will still let some water through, to some degree. The effect you’re talking about is called “wetting out” or “impermeability”, and is when more water gets through the shell of a jacket than it’s supposed to. This happens because there’s usually a certain amount of air trapped in a jacket, and the trapped air holds some water vapor. That trapped air acts as insulation to keep you warm, but it can also let some water vapor through. What causes the air to fill up and get trapped in your jacket? It’s a complex process, but one thing is the way the air flows in when you’re walking. The way the air flows in depends on the way the shell of your jacket is structured. In a traditional waterproof jacket, the jacket has a thick piece of insulation that blocks some of the incoming air from flowing through to the outside. When this thick insulating material gets wet, it can hold even more water than before, causing the trapped air in your jacket to get even more waterlogged. You could use “breathability” fabrics or technology to help with this problem, but you might find that your waterproof jacket can’t be easily fixed.

response_0.content: Can you explain how taxi fare is calculated for a trip?

The fares are based on a combination of sources of cost. The driver of the taxi is paid a salary, and then he must also pay rent for the taxi, as well as various ongoing costs such as overhead expenses, insurance, and taxes. The customer pays a base price plus an additional fee for distance traveled.

response_1.content: Can you explain how taxi fare is calculated for a trip?

The price of a taxi ride is based on three factors: the amount of the fare that goes to the taxi company, the tax rate, and the tip for the driver.  Taxi companies generally keep most of the fare, and then tend to pay out some fraction of the fare to drivers as a salary or wage.  Taxis in the United States are generally required to charge a tax based on the amount of the fare, as well, which varies based on the rate for the city or state the taxi is in.  Finally, it’s normal to round up the total fare to give a tip for the driver, and people are often encouraged to give tips to taxi drivers.

response_0.content: I am planning on making a pecan pie this Thanksgiving but I have never made one before. Do you have any recipes or tips on how to make a great pecan pie?

Sure!  Pecan pie is a real classic and it’s very easy to make.  The most important thing to do first is make sure the pie is pre-baked.  When you pre-bake the pie it will make it easier to caramelize the filling and improve the flavor.  Here’s a basic recipe for you:

-  2 egg yolks
-  1 cup dark brown sugar
-  1/2 cup granulated sugar
-  3/4 cup heavy cream
-  1/2 teaspoon vanilla
-  1 teaspoon salt
-  1/2 cup cold butter
-  3 1/2 cups chopped pecans

Beat together the egg yolks and both sugars.  Add the cream, vanilla, salt and butter, then stir in the pecans.  Pour into your pre-baked pie shell.  Sprinkle the top with a pinch of sugar.  Put the pie in the oven and bake it at 350°F for about 45 minutes.

As it so happens, the other side of most objects or surfaces typically contains many interesting and diverse things!  

Let’s consider the other side of some familiar objects or surfaces:  

-The other side of a cup is the inverted cup.  The other side of a table is the underside of the table.

-The “other side” of the Moon is the far side, which Earthlings have only seen through telescopes.  The far side of the Moon contains a vast surface of heavily cratered terrain.

-The other side of a wall is typically an adjacent room or space.  The other side of a tall bridge is a distant landscape.  The other side of a mountain pass is a high mountain valley.  The other side of a wall of mist or fog is often a lush and beautiful valley or gully.   

So there you have it - basically, the “other side” refers to the far side of some surface or object.  The other side often contains interesting and diverse things, and often implies that one must travel to that side in some manner in order to experience it.

response_0.content: can small cacti be kept indoors?

They can absolutely be kept inside a home.  Many people keep cacti on their counters or shelves, and some grow cacti in decorative terrariums.  They need heat and humidity to grow, so a cactus potted in soil would need to be placed in a warmer spot, such as on a windowsill.  You may want to provide them with a humidifier if you keep them in a pot on a shelf.
are all cacti able to be kept like this or only certain types?

All cacti can be grown this way, but some varieties are more likely to stay healthy indoors than others.  Often you’ll see larger pots of cacti sold as indoor plants, or small pots you can keep inside.  They need to be planted in soil and kept warm and humid.  A large majority of cacti can grow indoors.
will they still produce flowers if indoors?

Yes, some cacti will grow flowers inside and some will not.  This will depend on the specific variety, and also on how the plant is cared for.  If you provide a warm, humid environment with heat, most cacti will grow flowers.  And some cacti are more likely than others to grow flowers.  So you may want to check the varieties you want to grow to see if they are known to grow well indoors.

Then they kept parts of the country, and granted access to US citizens and their businesses, and international power brokers who had influence over the US government.  Finally they gave up the land that they had kept.

response_0.content: What are some things one can do to boost their dopamine levels?

As in any psychopathology, one can talk about factors that promote or depress the expression of the syndrome, but that’s probably more confusing than helpful.  In this specific case, the dopamine system is a neurotransmitter that works to coordinate, process, and distribute signals of various types in the nervous system.  For a small part of that mechanism, there are two endogenous receptors for dopamine that work by binding to the neurotransmitter and transporting it elsewhere in the body.  Without these two receptors, dopamine is either bound to the cell membrane or transported to the synaptic space of other neurons, which also bind to and transport it away from the transmitter in their own way.  In the “boost dopamine levels” sense, one could just change the “environment” so that a greater number of these neurotransmitters are released, but this won’t actually change the amount of the transmitter that is bound to the receptors.

response_0.content: Can you tell me about the process of 3D printing things? How is it done?

Sure, the concept of 3D printing is actually not new, although they’ve made some big recent advances in the technology.  The general idea is that you have a machine with a movable platform, and a laser beam that scans the platform.  The laser beam measures the position of the platform, and based on that information the machine controls a 3D print head that’s mounted above the platform.  The print head has a melted polymer or other print material inside, and it spits out a thin layer of the material onto the platform.  The machine moves the platform downward as it builds the next layer on top of the previous one, until they’ve created the 3D object they want.  It’s a pretty simple process, once you have the machine set up.

response_1.content: Can you tell me about the process of 3D printing things? How is it done?

Sure, let’s try. First of all, 3D printing is just one method of making physical objects, but it’s rapidly becoming a popular technology for certain applications.  It works by building the object layer by layer, so you need a 3D model of the object you want to print.  This model is converted into a file that the printer understands, and then that file gets printed.  This file can be downloaded from online sources, or you might have something like a digital camera-style device that you scan your object into, or you might have a 3D printer that you control from a computer.

response_0.content: What age kids need a booster seat?

The US Federal Highway Administration recommends children be in a booster seat until age 8.  That’s because the seatbelt won’t go all the way across your chest as an adult.  So to give the seatbelt the best chance of protecting you in an accident, a booster seat can put you at the proper angle to fit the belt.
So when should you switch from a baby seat to a booster?

It depends.  For a child who is significantly taller than other kids, this might be around age 4.  For a child who is average or shorter, it can be 5 or 6.  But you should also consider whether your child is growing quickly, as that might affect how quickly they grow to need a booster.

response_0.content: Who are the Australian aboriginals?

The Australian Aborigines are the original inhabitants of Australia and its surrounding islands.  The first aborigines arrived in Australia possibly as early as around 50,000 years ago, and the Australian continent was likely sparsely populated until around 4,000 years ago.  Though the Australian Aboriginal people belong to many different tribes, they all share similar cultural elements.  They were nomadic hunter-gatherers who developed a unique language and society that continue to this day.  The aboriginal people were never significantly displaced by settlers from Europe or North America, though they did suffer huge reductions in population over the past century due to diseases introduced by settlers, and their land and privileges were severely violated by Europeans who settled in Australia during the 1800s.

This sentence contradicts itself - The aboriginal people were never significantly displaced by settlers from Europe or North America, though they did suffer huge reductions in population over the past century due to diseases introduced by settlers, and their land and privileges were severely violated by Europeans who settled in Australia during the 1800s.

You’re right, that sentence is indeed contradictory, but it doesn’t mean that the aboriginal people were significantly displaced by settlers.  According to Wikipedia, “the Aboriginal population grew from an estimated 250,000 at the time of British settlement in 1788 to 310,000 in 1901 and 319,000 in 1947. After that it declined rapidly to 165,000 by 1971; and by 2011 it was estimated at 548,000 or 2.5 percent of the population of 23 million.”  So even though Europeans did often displace or harm the aboriginal people of Australia in the 1800s, the effects of that are declining over time, and improvements have been made.  I hope that helps.
Did Aboriginal people have a written language?

Yes, the Aboriginal people did have some form of writing, though it wasn’t nearly as developed as the European written language.  There is evidence that Aboriginal languages used a form of symbolic and pictorial writing, called “sand writing”.  A basic system was taught to European settlers in the 1800s, and some of this writing is still preserved today.  However, the Aboriginal people did not develop the same written language that was used by Europeans or other cultures.  That’s likely because the Australian Aboriginal people were largely nomadic hunter-gatherers, and in that kind of lifestyle, there wasn’t as much need to develop a complex written language or record their history in writing.

Well there’s a few things you can do! For example, one thing you can do is call your local electric company, or contact them in other ways, and let them know that there’s an outage so they can send someone to fix the issue. For example, if your house is heated by electricity, you might find that a generator or gas heaters can help you out.  

Another thing you can do is head outside to get away from the cold, and get some fresh air. If you’re not feeling any better after a while, you might want to try making some phone calls, making sure you keep your body moving to stay warm and help prevent getting hypothermia. You can also consider going to a public building that might still have heat.

There are also documented cases where attackers have used spiked clubs or tire irons to pin the porcupine’s quills to the ground.

There are various strategies predators take to subdue porcupines that are face up, but not all of those are by turning them over onto their bellies.  Instead, they may be aggressive by blocking the porcupine's escape route, and immobilizing it so that it can no longer bite or break off quills.  For example, the fishers and fisher-dogs use their large paws to grasp the porcupine around the sides of the head, which then forces the porcupine to face downwards, and keeps its legs and its quills from moving.  If the porcupine manages to break free, it is unable to escape because the aggressors are so large that they are blocking the porcupine's retreat route.  Another technique used is to cover the porcupine in moss, and when it has been immobilized by moss and captured, to remove the moss.
